name: Chili-Orange Fish Fillets with Banana
recipeIngredient: 2 firm ripe bananas, halved lengthwise and then crosswise
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the broiler.
2. Arrange the fish fillets and bananas (cut side up) on a lightly greased broiler pan.
3. In a small bowl, combine half the orange juice with the orange zest, red onion, chilies, and a pinch each of salt and pepper. Spread evenly over the fish and bananas.
4. Broil 4 inches from the heat source until the fish and bananas are well browned and the center of the thickest part of the fish is opaque, about 10 minutes.
5. Transfer to a serving platter. Sprinkle with the remaining orange juice.
6. Garnish with lime wedges.
